text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hoo boy! This is somethin' else!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
My chest's all hot, and I feel power flowin' right
through me!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Think this could be the work of some kinda
Japanese supernatural thingamajig?
